name: Mantine
description: A fully featured React components library with 100+ customizable components and 70+ hooks

description.value: A fully featured React components library with 100+ customizable components and 70+ hooks

active-maintenance.comment: Very active - v8.3.10 released December 9, 2025; 284 total releases; 500+ contributors; regular patch releases every 1-2 weeks

initial-release.comment: Development started January 2021, v1.0 launched May 3, 2021

framework.comment: React exclusive, requires React 18.0.0 or higher

styling-approach.comment: Native CSS files since v7.0 (moved away from Emotion CSS-in-JS); CSS modules recommended; PostCSS preset available; Vanilla Extract and Emotion optional

component-model.comment: Styled component library with ready-to-use visuals; can be used headless by not importing styles

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (80.8% of codebase) with first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Full SSR support with Next.js, documented guides for server-side rendering

rsc-compatible.comment: Mantine components cannot be used as server components; must use 'use client' directive in Next.js app router

design-system.comment: Custom design system with comprehensive theming capabilities

dark-mode.comment: Built-in light/dark theme support with localStorage persistence and system preference detection

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming via MantineTheme interface: colors, typography, spacing, shadows, gradients, etc.

css-variables.comment: Extensive CSS custom properties prefixed with --mantine- for all design tokens

design-tokens.comment: Exportable design tokens via theme object: color palettes, spacing, fontSizes, radius, shadows, etc.

rtl-support.comment: RTL support documented in theming system

component-count.comment: 127 components across all @mantine/* packages as of v8.3.10

text-input.comment: TextInput component with password, email, search variants and left/right sections

multi-select.comment: MultiSelect component with multiple selection support

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with indeterminate state and checkbox groups

switch-toggle.comment: Switch toggle component for boolean values

slider.comment: Slider and RangeSlider components with single or dual-thumb support

tag-input.comment: TagsInput for multiple tags/tokens with add/remove functionality

pin-input.comment: PinInput for OTP/PIN code entry with individual digit boxes

color-picker.comment: ColorPicker component with full picker UI

date-picker.comment: DatePicker in @mantine/dates package with calendar-based selection, supports single, multiple, and range modes

time-picker.comment: TimeInput and TimePicker components in @mantine/dates package

date-range-picker.comment: DatePicker with type='range' for start and end date selection

file-upload.comment: FileInput component with file preview support

dropzone.comment: Dropzone component in @mantine/dropzone package with drag-and-drop file upload, built on react-dropzone

rating-input.comment: Rating component for star ratings with fractional support and custom symbols

input-groups.comment: Input component supports leftSection and rightSection props for icons, buttons, and text addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: Not provided as distinct component; can be composed with Combobox or Popover

split-button.comment: Not provided as built-in component; can be composed with Menu and Button

table.comment: Basic Table component with sticky headers, striped rows, hover effects

data-table.comment: Not in core; mantine-react-table (community, 60k weekly downloads) provides advanced features with TanStack Table integration

virtual-infinite-list.comment: Not in core; mantine-react-table supports virtualization via @tanstack/react-virtual; integrate react-window or TanStack Virtual for custom lists

tree-view.comment: Tree component for hierarchical data with expansion control, selection, and customizable rendering

list-view.comment: List component with styled list items

avatar.comment: Avatar component with image and fallback support

tag-chip-pill.comment: Pill component for standalone tags/chips with removable option

timeline.comment: Timeline component for vertical event timelines

calendar.comment: Calendar and MiniCalendar components in @mantine/dates for month/week views

alert.comment: Alert component for static messages with multiple variants and accessibility features

toast-notification.comment: Notification system in @mantine/notifications package for temporary popup notifications

progress-bar.comment: Progress component for linear progress indicators

progress-circle.comment: RingProgress and SemiCircleProgress for circular progress indicators

spinner-loader.comment: Loader component with multiple visual variants for indeterminate loading

skeleton.comment: Skeleton component for content placeholders during loading

empty-state.comment: Not provided as dedicated component; compose with Text, Title, and Button

modal-dialog.comment: Modal and Dialog components with focus trapping, keyboard navigation, and accessibility

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer component for slide-in panels from edges

popover.comment: Popover component for floating content anchored to triggers

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component for hover hints with accessibility support

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu component for action menus with keyboard navigation and submenus

context-menu.comment: Not in core; mantine-contextmenu (community package by Mantine DataTable creator) provides desktop-grade right-click menus

command-palette.comment: Spotlight component in @mantine/spotlight package for ⌘K style command palette

tabs.comment: Tabs component with keyboard navigation and WAI-ARIA compliance

stepper.comment: Stepper component for multi-step process indicator and navigation

navigation-menu.comment: NavLink and Menu components support building navigation menus with dropdowns

sidebar.comment: AppShell component provides complete application layout with collapsible sidebar

bottom-navigation.comment: Not provided as dedicated component; can be built with Group/Stack and ActionIcon

grid.comment: Grid and SimpleGrid components for responsive 12-column grid system

stack.comment: Stack component for vertical layout, Flex for flexible layouts

container.comment: Container component for max-width content constraints

aspect-ratio.comment: AspectRatio component to maintain aspect ratios

collapsible.comment: Collapse component for expandable/collapsible content with slide animations

resizable.comment: Not in core; @gfazioli/mantine-split-pane (community extension v2.5.1) provides resizable panels

splitter.comment: Not in core; @gfazioli/mantine-split-pane (community extension) provides split panes with keyboard and mouse control

rich-text-editors.comment: @mantine/tiptap package provides official Tiptap integration with UI wrapper

code-editors.comment: No official code editor integration; use Monaco or CodeMirror separately

chart-libraries.comment: @mantine/charts package based on Recharts with LineChart, BarChart, AreaChart, PieChart, ScatterChart, etc.

form-libraries.comment: @mantine/form package provides standalone form state management with useForm hook; no dependencies on external form libraries

animation-libraries.comment: No documented official integration; Framer Motion and other animation libraries can be used separately

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled icons; Tabler Icons (@tabler/icons-react) recommended and used in documentation, but not a required dependency

date-libraries.comment: @mantine/dates requires dayjs as mandatory dependency for date manipulation and formatting

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA accessibility guidelines with proper roles and aria-* attributes

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation support for all interactive components

screen-reader-tested.comment: Manually tested with VoiceOver screen reader; 10,000+ unit tests including jest-axe accessibility tests

focus-management.comment: Proper focus management with focus trapping in modals and focus restoration

wcag-level.comment: Components designed to meet WCAG 2.1 AA compliance with ARIA attributes and semantic HTML

accessibility-rating.comment: Good - WAI-ARIA compliant, keyboard navigation, screen reader tested (VoiceOver), focus management, 10,000+ tests including axe; explicitly designed for WCAG AA

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle size not meaningful for tree-shakeable library; historical v5.1.6 UMD was ~450KB uncompressed, modern builds use tree-shaking

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable architecture - bundle size depends on components imported; recommend measuring per-component via bundlephobia

tree-shakeable.comment: Fully tree-shakeable with modern bundlers (Vite, Next.js); unused components removed at build time

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior; CSS moved to native files in v7.0 (no CSS-in-JS runtime overhead)

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent - 306 documentation pages, 1234 demos, comprehensive API reference, interactive examples, guides for Next.js/Vite/styling/theming

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes live component playground with editable code examples

storybook.comment: No official public Storybook; documentation site serves as interactive component explorer

figma-kit.comment: Pretine 7 (community, free) provides comprehensive Figma UI kit with 1:1 Mantine 7 component matching, variables, responsive design; also Mantine UI Design System v5.10

cli-generator.comment: Not official; mantine-component-cli (Python, community) available for component management; no official CLI from Mantine team

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: 1,158,646 weekly downloads for @mantine/core as of December 2025

commercial-support.comment: MIT licensed open source; community support via Discord (10,000+ members) and GitHub Discussions; funded via OpenCollective; no paid enterprise tier

style-override.comment: Styles API with classNames/styles props for element selectors; CSS variables via vars prop; static classes .mantine-{Component}-{selector} for external CSS

compound-components.comment: Extensive compound component pattern (e.g., Menu.Item, Tabs.Panel, Card.Section, Button.Group)

render-props.comment: Styles API accepts callback functions receiving theme and props for dynamic styling

slots.comment: Styles API provides named slots/selectors for targeting inner elements (root, label, inner, section, etc.)

unstyled-mode.comment: Can be used headless by not importing @mantine/*/styles.css; apply custom styles via Styles API
